scripts.lint:ci: bun run lint && bun run codegen:validate && bun run lint:ts
scripts.codegen:validate: previous_hash=$(bun run --silent codegen:hash) && bun run codegen && if test $previous_hash = $(bun run --silent codegen:hash);then echo 'Types is consistent within current schema'; exit 0; else echo 'Types is not consistent within schema'; exit 1; fi
scripts.codegen:hash: echo $(find ./shared/graphql/generated -type f -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 sha256sum | sha256sum | cut -d " " -f 1);
